title: Leakage-Safe EEG Biomarker Analysis After Mild Traumatic Brain Injury: A Preregistered OpenNeuro Reanalysis and Replication Feasibility Study
description: Reviewer-facing analysis code, frozen analysis plan, derived outputs, and manuscript materials for a leakage-safe OpenNeuro EEG biomarker reanalysis and replication-feasibility audit. Archived release DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20682573.

creators.name: Pierpoint, Gregory Blake
creators.affiliation: Macon and Joan Brock Virginia Health Sciences, Eastern Virginia Medical School at Old Dominion University
